REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (31 Grafton Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for Barbara de Vries.

The sale was confirmed at $1,005,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 6, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The amount of the additional bond is to be determined by Counsel.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
